title: FabricationInstructionGenerationInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for fabrication slicer, CAM, postprocess, setup-sheet, inspection-plan, and machine-code generation workers. NATS subject names live in @dd/nats-subject-defs; these types describe the request and result bodies published on those subjects.

FabricationInstructionSourceArtifact.title: FabricationInstructionSourceArtifact
FabricationInstructionSourceArtifact.description: Verified geometry, slicer project, CAM setup, sheet nesting, mesh report, or assembly graph artifact that an instruction-generation worker can consume.

artifactId.description: Stable artifact id, usually returned by a design conversion worker or retained by the Rust planner.

sourceInputId.description: Original design input id when the artifact traces back to a specific CAD, mesh, slicer, or CAM source.

format.description: Artifact format such as STEP, STL, 3MF, DXF, CAM_SETUP_JSON, SHEET_NESTING_JSON, SLICER_PROJECT, MESH_REPAIR_REPORT, or ASSEMBLY_GRAPH_JSON.

uri.description: Sanitized artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the source artifact when available.

evidence.description: Evidence labels already attached to this artifact, such as units-verified, mesh-manifold, profile-closed, cam-setup-reviewed, or slicer-profile-verified.

FabricationInstructionMachineProfile.title: FabricationInstructionMachineProfile
FabricationInstructionMachineProfile.description: Machine, controller, slicer, or postprocessor profile requested for instruction generation.

machineId.description: Planner-local or fleet machine id, e.g. prusa-mk4-01, haas-vf2-03, okuma-lathe-02, waterjet-01.

machineClass.description: Machine class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, powder-bed, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, or postprocess-station.

controllerDialect.description: Controller or dialect target such as Marlin, RepRap, Klipper, Haas NGC, Fanuc, LinuxCNC, GRBL, Heidenhain, Okuma, PrusaSlicer, OrcaSlicer, Cura, Bambu Studio, or vendor-specific profile.

postProcessor.description: Postprocessor, slicer, CAM template, or adapter id used to generate instructions.

material.description: Requested material or stock profile, e.g. PETG, 6061-T6 aluminum, 316 stainless, acrylic sheet, resin, nylon powder.

workEnvelope.description: Human-readable work envelope or build volume summary retained for review.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence labels required before generated instructions can be considered for release on this machine.

FabricationInstructionOperation.title: FabricationInstructionOperation
FabricationInstructionOperation.description: One additive, subtractive, sheet-cutting, inspection, postprocess, or assembly operation for instruction generation.

operationId.description: Stable operation id used to correlate generated machine code and setup evidence.

partId.description: Part, subassembly, or stock id affected by this operation.

process.description: Process label such as fdm-print, resin-print, powder-bed-print, vertical-mill-roughing, horizontal-mill-indexing, lathe-turning, router-profile, laser-cut, waterjet-cut, deburr, heat-set-inserts, inspection, or assembly.

machineClass.description: Machine class required for this operation.

sourceArtifactIds.description: Source artifact ids consumed by this operation.

requirements.description: Operation-specific release requirements such as verified workholding, tool list, coolant, material conditioning, support media, simulation, inspection datum, or operator resume evidence.

FabricationInstructionGenerationTarget.title: FabricationInstructionGenerationTarget
FabricationInstructionGenerationTarget.description: One machine-code, setup, inspection, postprocess, or operator-instruction artifact requested from a worker.

targetId.description: Stable target id used to correlate generated outputs with requested instruction artifacts.

operationId.description: Operation id this target belongs to.

machineId.description: Machine profile id this target should use when machine-specific output is requested.

format.description: Requested instruction format such as GCODE, NC, TAP, 3MF, BAMBUPROJECT, SETUP_SHEET_MD, TOOL_LIST_JSON, INSPECTION_PLAN_JSON, POSTPROCESS_PLAN_MD, WORKHOLDING_PLAN_JSON, or SIMULATION_REPORT_JSON.

purpose.description: Why this artifact is needed, e.g. printer job, mill roughing, lathe finishing, sheet cutting, setup verification, inspection release, postprocess, or assembly.

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence labels that must be returned before the planner can consider this instruction artifact releasable.

FabricationInstructionBlocker.title: FabricationInstructionBlocker
FabricationInstructionBlocker.description: A release or instruction-generation blocker reported by a planner or worker.

code.description: Stable blocker code, e.g. missing-postprocessor, toolpath-simulation-required, workholding-release-required, printer-profile-release-required, material-conditioning-required, tool-list-required, or human-intervention-required.

message.description: Human-readable blocker summary safe for operator logs.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this blocker when applicable.

targetId.description: Instruction target id associated with this blocker when applicable.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this blocker when applicable.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on release posture, e.g. blocks-machine-ready, needs-operator-review, warning-only, or can-run-with-supervision.

FabricationGeneratedInstructionArtifact.title: FabricationGeneratedInstructionArtifact
FabricationGeneratedInstructionArtifact.description: Generated machine code, setup sheet, inspection plan, simulation report, postprocess plan, or operator instruction returned by a worker.

artifactId.description: Stable generated artifact id retained by the planner.

targetId.description: Requested target id this artifact satisfies.

operationId.description: Operation id this artifact belongs to.

machineId.description: Machine id this artifact targets when machine-specific.

format.description: Generated instruction format such as GCODE, NC, TAP, SETUP_SHEET_MD, TOOL_LIST_JSON, INSPECTION_PLAN_JSON, POSTPROCESS_PLAN_MD, or SIMULATION_REPORT_JSON.

uri.description: Sanitized artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the generated instruction artifact when available.

mediaType.description: MIME type or controlled media label for the artifact.

controllerDialect.description: Controller dialect or slicer/postprocessor target used for this artifact.

estimatedRuntimeSec.description: Estimated runtime in seconds when the worker can provide it.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this instruction artifact, such as toolpath-simulated, collision-check-passed, slicer-profile-verified, tool-list-verified, workholding-reviewed, or human-intervention-boundary-marked.

previewLines.description: Short sanitized preview lines for operator review. Do not include full programs here.

FabricationInstructionGenerationRequest.title: FabricationInstructionGenerationRequest
FabricationInstructionGenerationRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.requests for slicer, CAM, postprocess, setup-sheet, inspection, and machine-code workers.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-generation.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this instruction generation job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that spawned this instruction generation job.

jobId.description: Optional fabrication job id when the planner has already persisted one.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.results.

sourceArtifacts.description: Verified geometry, slicer, CAM, nesting, mesh, or assembly artifacts that instruction workers can consume.

machineProfiles.description: Machine profiles, controller dialects, postprocessors, slicer profiles, materials, and release evidence requested for generation.

operations.description: Operations that need machine code, setup sheets, inspection instructions, postprocess plans, or assembly instructions.

targets.description: Requested printer jobs, G-code, NC programs, lathe cycles, sheet-cutting files, setup sheets, tool lists, inspection plans, simulation reports, postprocess plans, and operator instructions.

blockers.description: Planner-known blockers that workers may clear by returning verified instruction artifacts or evidence.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent generation work.

notes.description: Non-secret planning notes for the worker.

FabricationInstructionGenerationResult.title: FabricationInstructionGenerationResult
FabricationInstructionGenerationResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.generation.results with generated machine code, setup/operator instructions, simulation evidence, blockers, and machine-ready posture.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-generation.result.v1.

requestId.description: Instruction generation request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original instruction generation job.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

generator.description: Slicer, CAM, postprocessor, simulator, setup-sheet, inspection-plan, or operator-instruction adapter used.

generatorVersion.description: Generator or adapter version used for repeatability and learning attribution.

success.description: True when the worker completed its requested instruction generation or review work.

machineReady.description: True only when returned instructions and evidence are sufficient for the planner to consider the instruction lane releasable.

artifacts.description: Generated machine-code, setup, simulation, inspection, postprocess, or operator-instruction artifacts returned by the worker.

blockers.description: Remaining blockers or new worker-discovered blockers.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings that should be retained with the instruction evidence.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as postprocessor settings, slicer profile names, simulation summaries, machine envelope checks, tool libraries, fixture ids, or detected human-intervention boundaries.
